name: @sinco-lab/mcp-youtube-transcript
description: A server built on the Model Context Protocol (MCP) that enables direct downloading of YouTube video transcripts, supporting AI and video analysis workflows.
author: sinco

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
